argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const op = 'UserByScreenName'; const fallback = 'IGgvgiOx4QZndDHuD3x9TQ'; let scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length < 5) { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length >= 5) break; } } let queryId = fallback; for (const scriptUrl of scripts.slice(0, 30)) { try { const text = await (await fetch(scriptUrl)).text(); const re = new RegExp('queryId:"([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)"[^}]{0,200}operationName:"' + op + '"'); const match = text.match(re); if (match) { queryId = match[1]; break; } } catch {} } return { queryId }; }

async (intermediate) => { const queryId = intermediate.queryId; const username = '{{ username }}'.replace(/^@/, ''); const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com (no ct0 cookie)' }; const bearer = 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANRILgAAAAAAnNwIzUejRCOuH5E6I8xnZz4puTs%3D1Zv7ttfk8LF81IUq16cHjhLTvJu4FA33AGWWjCpTnA'; const headers = { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + decodeURIComponent(bearer), 'X-Csrf-Token': ct0, 'X-Twitter-Auth-Type': 'OAuth2Session', 'X-Twitter-Active-User': 'yes' }; const variables = JSON.stringify({ screen_name: username, withSafetyModeUserFields: true }); const features = JSON.stringify({ hidden_profile_subscriptions_enabled: true, rweb_tipjar_consumption_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_exclude_directive_enabled: true, verified_phone_label_enabled: false, subscriptions_verification_info_is_identity_verified_enabled: true, subscriptions_verification_info_verified_since_enabled: true, highlights_tweets_tab_ui_enabled: true, responsive_web_twitter_article_notes_tab_enabled: true, subscriptions_feature_can_gift_premium: true, creator_subscriptions_tweet_preview_api_enabled: true, responsive_web_graphql_skip_user_profile_image_extensions_enabled: false, responsive_web_graphql_timeline_navigation_enabled: true }); const url = '/i/api/graphql/' + queryId + '/UserByScreenName?variables=' + encodeURIComponent(variables) + '&features=' + encodeURIComponent(features); const resp = await fetch(url, { headers, credentials: 'include' }); if (!resp.ok) return { error: 'HTTP ' + resp.status }; const d = await resp.json(); const result = d.data?.user?.result; if (!result) return { error: 'User @' + username + ' not found' }; const legacy = result.legacy || {}; const avatar = result.avatar?.image_url || legacy.profile_image_url_https || ''; const expandedUrl = legacy.entities?.url?.urls?.[0]?.expanded_url || ''; const birthdate = result.legacy_extended_profile?.birthdate; const birthdateStr = birthdate ? `${birthdate.year || ''}-${birthdate.month || ''}-${birthdate.day || ''}` : ''; return { profile: { screen_name: result.core?.screen_name || username, name: result.core?.name || '', bio: legacy.description || '', location: result.location?.location || legacy.location || '', url: expandedUrl, avatar: avatar, followers: legacy.followers_count || 0, following: legacy.friends_count || 0, tweets: legacy.statuses_count || 0, likes: legacy.favourites_count || 0, media: legacy.media_count || 0, listed: legacy.listed_count || 0, verified: result.is_blue_verified || legacy.verified || false, created_at: result.core?.created_at || '', birthdate: birthdateStr } }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ screen_name: '', name: '', bio: '', location: '', url: '', avatar: '', followers: 0, following: 0, tweets: 0, likes: 0, media: 0, listed: 0, verified: false, created_at: '', birthdate: '', error: intermediate.error }]; return [intermediate.profile]; }

description: Fetch a Twitter user profile (bio, stats, etc.)
name: Profile
